data.name: Look at our: Cyber-butts
data.detailed_description:
這是一款以精準、控制和視覺誘惑為焦點的高速未來派街機遊戲。

您的角色是對一系列賽博格女性單位進行啟動測試和穩定性測試。這些測試並非關於故事或敘事進展，而是關於突破每個賽博格的極限，解鎖隱藏在其合成表面之下的東西。

這款遊戲的核心吸引力在於其明確的獎勵驅動設計。每次成功測試都會獲得成人導向視覺內容的訪問權限。隨著您的進展，您將解鎖越來越大膽的插圖和簡短動畫場景，所有內容都儲存在集成畫廊中供私人觀看。

沒有傳統情節、探索或角色發展。體驗圍繞一個簡單而令人上癮的循環構建：技能成功揭示收集。

遊戲玩法 測試系統

每次測試基於區域捕獲街機機制。您在場上移動繪製線條來隔離和聲明螢幕的部分，同時避免敵對實體和系統防禦。

一旦您完全揭示了圖像，您將收到該圖像的動畫版本添加到您的畫廊中，您可以在那裡與其他已解鎖的影片一起觀看。

主要特點：

  • 專注於反應和時機的街機風格遊戲玩法。

  • 具有時尚安卓和賽博格角色的賽博龐克美學。

  • 漸進式解鎖挑釁性插圖和簡短場景。

  • 包含所有已解鎖成人內容的集成畫廊。

  • 專為成人觀眾設計。

結果是一款緊湊而大膽的獎勵驅動體驗，結合了經典街機機制和刻意色情的進展系統，面向享受具有非常明確視覺激勵的技能挑戰的玩家。

data.short_description: 一款圖像發現街機遊戲，您將在其中測試豐滿賽博格的能力。完成測試並解鎖火熱的圖像和影片用於您的畫廊。
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 記憶體: 16 MB 記憶體

data.name: Look at our: Cyber-butts
data.detailed_description:
This is a fast-paced futuristic arcade game focused on precision, control, and visual temptation.

Your role is to perform activation and stability tests on a series of cybernetic female units. These tests are not about story or narrative progression, but about pushing each cyborg’s limits and unlocking what lies beneath their synthetic surface.

The core appeal of the game is its explicit reward-driven design. Every successful test grants access to adult-oriented visual content. As you progress, you unlock increasingly bold illustrations and short animated scenes, all stored in an integrated gallery for private viewing.

There is no traditional plot, exploration, or character development. The experience is built around a simple and addictive loop: skill → success → reveal → collection.

Gameplay – The Testing System

Each test is based on an area-capture arcade mechanic. You move across the field drawing lines to isolate and claim portions of the screen, while avoiding hostile entities and system defenses.

Once you have revealed the entire image, you will receive an animated version of the image to add to your gallery, where you can view it alongside the other videos you have unlocked.

Key Features:

  • Arcade-style gameplay focused on reflexes and timing.

  • Cyberpunk aesthetic with sleek android and cyborg characters.

  • Progressive unlocking of provocative illustrations and short scenes.

  • Integrated gallery with all unlocked adult content.

  • Designed exclusively for adult audiences.

The result is a compact, shamelessly reward-focused experience that blends classic arcade mechanics with a deliberately erotic progression system, aimed at players who enjoy skill-based gameplay with very clear visual incentives.

data.short_description: An image discovery arcade game where you will test the abilities of voluptuous cyborgs. Complete the tests and unlock hot images and videos for your gallery.
